Bullet Point 2: FAKE MEAT, REAL MEATY FLAVOR: Louisville Vegan Jerky’s Smokey Carolina BBQ vegan jerky is marinated with sweet & tangy barbecue flavors. The seasonings are delicately balanced for an authentic Carolina BBQ flavor.

Bullet Point 5: HANDMADE IN AMERICA: Non-GMO certified, gluten-free, cholesterol-free, & handmade in small batches with freshly sourced Kentucky ingredients. True artisan quality with inspired flavors, delicious texture, & 15 grams of protein per bag.

overall_summary: Louisville Vegan Jerky positions itself as a premium, artisan product with a strong regional identity and specialty appeal. Organic, non-GMO, and gluten-free certifications, along with 15g protein per bag, cater to health-conscious and vegan consumers willing to pay for specialty ingredients and unique flavors. The brand’s localized storytelling and small-batch authenticity further elevate perceived value.
